description: Brain gains deterministic validation checks that run automatically: CLI wiring, binary freshness, workplan reconciliation, MCP-CLI parity, worktree integrity. Auto-fixes safe issues.

phases.description: Scan commands/*.rs files, verify each has pub mod in mod.rs and a Commands enum variant in main.rs. Report unwired modules.
phases.name: CLI wiring check

tasks.description: New function in hex-cli that: (1) globs hex-cli/src/commands/*.rs, (2) reads mod.rs for pub mod entries, (3) reads main.rs for Commands enum variants, (4) returns Vec of unwired modules. Pure function, no side effects.
tasks.name: Implement check_cli_wiring() in brain module

tasks.description: New BrainAction::Validate variant. Calls check_cli_wiring() and prints results. This is the entry point for all future checks.
tasks.name: Add hex brain validate subcommand

phases.description: Compare target/release/hex mtime with HEAD commit timestamp. If stale, trigger cargo build --release in background.
phases.name: Binary freshness check with auto-rebuild

tasks.description: Function that stats target/release/hex mtime, compares with git log -1 --format=%ct HEAD. If binary is older, spawn cargo build --release in background and return Stale status. Add to brain validate output.
tasks.name: Implement check_binary_freshness() with auto-rebuild

phases.description: On session start and post-merge, reconcile all active workplans with git evidence.
phases.name: Workplan auto-reconciliation

tasks.description: Function that lists docs/workplans/*.json with status != 'completed', runs reconcile logic on each, returns summary of stale tasks. Add to brain validate output.
tasks.name: Implement check_workplan_status() for all active workplans

phases.description: Compare MCP tool definitions with CLI Commands enum to detect missing CLI equivalents.
phases.name: MCP-CLI parity check

tasks.description: Function that: (1) reads hex-cli/assets/mcp/mcp-tools.json for tool list, (2) reads Commands enum variants from main.rs, (3) maps tool names to expected CLI commands, (4) returns Vec of MCP tools without CLI equivalents. Add to brain validate output.
tasks.name: Implement check_mcp_cli_parity()

phases.description: Wire brain validate into post-commit hook and session-start. Unified output with auto-fix for safe operations.
phases.name: Hook integration + unified validate command

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/hook.rs, add brain validate call to observe-post (or post-commit). Run subset: CLI wiring + binary freshness (fast checks only, <2s).
tasks.name: Wire brain validate into post-commit hook

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/hook.rs session-start handler, add workplan reconciliation + worktree status check. Print summary in session banner.
tasks.name: Wire brain validate into session-start

tasks.description: When brain validate finds: stale binary → auto-rebuild, stale workplans → auto-reconcile, stale worktrees → auto-cleanup. Print '[auto-fixed]' next to each. Only fix deterministic, safe operations.
tasks.name: Auto-fix for safe operations
